title: aldama mollis
intro: Aldama mollis, also known as the velvet groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Aldama mollis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Aldama mollis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
